payload.title: Project-to-board mapping: a project IS a workspace keyed by tenant_id
payload.description: Architectural keystone. Map each PG project (tenant_id) to a served board: provision a board when a project is created, and resolve the served workspace from the project rather than the single volume workspace. Decide + implement storage: wire SCP-124s per-tenant Postgres event log into the serve path, or per-tenant event-log directories keyed by tenant_id. Removes the disconnect where projects exist in PG but the served board is a lone file-based workspace.
